shelfmark_ssi: UTO Sinai Georgian NF M 55, SPP No. 255
contents_tesim: The second part of the Euthalian material belongs to the so-called chapter of testimonies, i.e., the register of quotations from Old Testament texts and other sources within Paul’s Epistles; cf. SIBE 2/3, I-1 to I-8
full_text_tesim: The second part of the Euthalian material belongs to the so-called chapter of testimonies, i.e., the register of quotations from Old Testament texts and other sources within Paul’s Epistles; cf. SIBE 2/3, I-1 to I-8
